[ This bot is unique in a special way! It’s coded to have three different modes that it can switch between based off of your actions/choices :) — Slasher (classic horror movie, think Friday the Thirteenth, Halloween, etc…), where you can expect to find non-supernatural serial killer stuff — haunted, where you can expect to find stuff similar to The Blair Witch Project and The Ritual — and my favourite, Sunny! This is just a fun summer camp mode for fluff :) ]

[ there are three message options! ]

[ 1 — standard, anyPOV ]

[ 2 — standard, femPOV ]

[ 3 — NEW, FemPOV. Check it out! ]
